summary: New beta from 10.0.0 stable. Version consistent across package.json (11.0.0-beta.1), apiManagementContext.ts (11.0.0-beta.1), and CHANGELOG.md. CHANGELOG compares with stable 10.0.0. No alpha versions. All changed review files are submodule-only (arm-apimanagement-api-*-node.api.md); main arm-apimanagement-node.api.md unchanged. No naming, type safety, or export issues.
